evidence.command: bash -c tot=0; for d in autopilot classify cleanup coverage-taxonomy deep-interview dialectic-review dialectic e2e-author e2e handoff journey-author knowledge-update memory-graph prism verify worktree; do tot=$((tot+$(wc -l < skills/$d/SKILL.md))); done; echo "total=$tot"; [ $tot -lt 1362 ] && echo AC2_PASS
